description_long: This object is a long, straight sword with a double-edged blade and a prominent crossguard. The blade is uniform in width and tapers slightly towards a rounded tip, suggesting it is designed for training or display rather than combat. The handle is cylindrical and capped with a spherical pommel, providing a secure grip and balance. The crossguard is straight and extends horizontally, offering hand protection. The entire object appears to be made from a single material, likely metal or a high-density polymer, and is finished in a matte black color. There are no visible engravings, inlays, or decorative elements, giving it a utilitarian and minimalist appearance.
description: A long, straight, double-edged sword with a black matte finish, featuring a simple crossguard and a rounded pommel. The design is minimalist and functional, with no visible ornamentation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the straight blade, crossguard, and rounded pommel.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile of the blade and handle, with the crossguard visible as a thin line.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying the straight blade, crossguard, and pommel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thinness of the blade and handle, with the crossguard as a line.
